04_Back_Yard_Light_GPT.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Back Yard Light GPT" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Back Yard Light GPT — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_switch
      to: "off"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_off
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev0
    - variables:
        programatic: "false"
    - variables:
        manualOveride: "false"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s8
  alias: "PistonCore: Back Yard Light GPT — $8"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: numeric_state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_illuminance
      below: 100
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_switch
      to: "off"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | is_number and states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | float(0) < 100 }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_switch') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: or
      conditions:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype') == 'person' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_motion') == 'on' }}"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_on
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev0
    - variables:
        programatic: "true"
    - variables:
        manualOveride: "false"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s20
  alias: "PistonCore: Back Yard Light GPT — $20"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_switch
      to: "on"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ () }}"
  actions:
    - variables:
        manualOveride: "true"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s25
  alias: "PistonCore: Back Yard Light GPT — $25"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id:
      to: "true"
      id: fire
  conditions:
    - condition: or
      conditions:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype') != 'person' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_motion') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ () }}"
  actions:
    - delay: "00:10:00"
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_motion') == 'off' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype') != 'person' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ () }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ () }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_switch') == 'on' }}"
      then:
        - action: light.turn_off
          target:
            entity_id: light.dev0
        - variables:
            programatic: "false"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s42
  alias: "PistonCore: Back Yard Light GPT — $42"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype
      to: "person"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_motion') == 'on' }}"
  actions: []

07_Basement_motion_Light.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Basement motion Light" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Basement motion Light — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype
      to: "person"
      id: fire
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_switch') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_illuminance') | is_number and states('sensor.dev2_illuminance') | float(0) < 1000 }}"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_on
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev0
    - delay: "00:05:00"
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype') == 'waiting' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_switch') == 'off' }}"
      then:
        - action: light.turn_off
          target:
            entity_id: light.dev0
        - variables:
            Motion_Triggered: "false"
    - variables:
        Motion_Triggered: "true"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s16
  alias: "PistonCore: Basement motion Light — $16"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_switch
  actions:
    - variables:
        Motion_Triggered: "false"

08_Bathroom_Light.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Bathroom Light" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Bathroom Light — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_contact
      to: "off"
  actions:
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | is_number and states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | float(0) < 1000 }}"
      then:
        - action: light.turn_on
          target:
            entity_id: light.dev1
      else:
        - if:
            - condition: template
              value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_contact') == 'on' }}"
          then:
            - action: light.turn_off
              target:
                entity_id: light.dev1
- id: pistoncore_snap_s10
  alias: "PistonCore: Bathroom Light — $10"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_switch
      to: "on"
      id: fire
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_switch
      to: "off"
      id: tcp_cancel
  conditions:
    - condition: trigger
      id: fire
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_contact') == 'on' }}"
  actions:
    - delay: "00:30:00"
    - action: light.turn_off
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev1

  actions:

        manualOveride: "true"

  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id:
      to: "true"

  conditions:
    - condition: or

          value_template: "{{ (states('sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype') != 'person' or states('sensor.dev3_smartdetecttype') != 'person') }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_motion') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ () }}"
  actions:
    - delay: "00:10:00"
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_motion') == 'off' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ (states('sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype') != 'person' or states('sensor.dev3_smartdetecttype') != 'person') }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ () }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ () }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_switch') == 'on' }}"
      then:
        - action: light.turn_off
          target:
            entity_id: light.dev2
        - variables:
            programatic: "false"

# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic

30_Glass_break.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Glass break" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Glass break — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id:
        - sensor.dev0_shock
        - sensor.dev1_shock
      from: "clear"
  actions:
    - variables:
        Message: "{{ state_attr(trigger.entity_id, 'friendly_name') ~ ' detected' }}"
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_presence') == 'not_home' }}"
      then:
        - action: notify.notify
          data:
            message: "{{ none }}"
      else:
        - action: notify.notify
          data:
            message: "{{ none }}"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s11
  alias: "PistonCore: Glass break — $11"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id:
        - sensor.dev0_tamper
        - sensor.dev1_tamper
      to: "detected"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_presence') == 'not_home' }}"
  actions:
    - action: notify.notify
      data:
        message: "A Glass break sensor has been tampered with"

32_Hall_Motion_Light_GPT_1.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Hall Motion Light GPT 1" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Hall Motion Light GPT 1 — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_switch
      to: "off"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_off
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev1
    - variables:
        programatic: "false"
    - variables:
        manualOveride: "false"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s8
  alias: "PistonCore: Hall Motion Light GPT 1 — $8"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: numeric_state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_illuminance
      below: 100
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_switch
      to: "off"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | is_number and states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | float(0) < 100 }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_switch') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: or
      conditions:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype') == 'person' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_motion') == 'on' }}"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_on
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev1
    - variables:
        programatic: "true"
    - variables:
        manualOveride: "false"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s20
  alias: "PistonCore: Hall Motion Light GPT 1 — $20"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_switch
      to: "on"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ () }}"
  actions:
    - variables:
        manualOveride: "true"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s25
  alias: "PistonCore: Hall Motion Light GPT 1 — $25"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id:
      to: "true"
      id: fire
  conditions:
    - condition: or
      conditions:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype') != 'person' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_motion') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ () }}"
  actions:
    - delay: "00:03:00"
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_motion') == 'off' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype') != 'person' }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ () }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ () }}"
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_switch') == 'on' }}"
      then:
        - action: light.turn_off
          target:
            entity_id: light.dev1
        - variables:
            programatic: "false"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s42
  alias: "PistonCore: Hall Motion Light GPT 1 — $42"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev2_smartdetecttype
      to: "person"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_motion') == 'on' }}"
  actions: []

36_Laundry_Light.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Laundry Light" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Laundry Light — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_contact
      to: "off"
  actions:
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | is_number and states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | float(0) < 1000 }}"
      then:
        - action: light.turn_on
          target:
            entity_id: light.dev0
      else:
        - if:
            - condition: template
              value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_contact') == 'on' }}"
          then:
            - action: light.turn_off
              target:
                entity_id: light.dev0
- id: pistoncore_snap_s10
  alias: "PistonCore: Laundry Light — $10"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_switch
      to: "on"
      id: fire
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_switch
      to: "off"
      id: tcp_cancel
  conditions:
    - condition: trigger
      id: fire
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev1_contact') == 'on' }}"
  actions:
    - delay: "00:30:00"
    - action: light.turn_off
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev0

      target:
        entity_id: light.dev1

64_Stove_Range_On.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Stove Range On" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Stove Range On — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev0_presence
      to: "not_home"
  actions:
    - if:
        - condition: template
          value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_presence') == 'not_home' }}"
      then:
        - if:
            - condition: template
              value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_cooktopoperatingstate') == 'run' }}"
          then:
            - action: notify.notify
              data:
                message: "{{ '\ud83d\udd25 Stove Range On \ud83d\udd25\n' ~ now().strftime('%B') ~ ' ' ~ now().day ~ ' - ' ~ now().strftime('%I:%M %p') ~ '\n\nNobody is home and the CookTop was left on\n.\nPlease return home now and turn it off\\'' }}"

67_Video_Hall_Motion_Light.json.code:
# Generated by PistonCore — piston "Video Hall Motion Light" (snap)
# DO NOT EDIT — changes are overwritten on recompile. Template band: yaml/classic
- id: pistoncore_snap_s1
  alias: "PistonCore: Video Hall Motion Light — $1"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id: sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype
      to: "person"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_switch') == 'off' }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | is_number and states('sensor.dev0_illuminance') | float(0) <= 700 }}"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_on
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev0
    - variables:
        Motion_Triggered: "true"
- id: pistoncore_snap_s9
  alias: "PistonCore: Video Hall Motion Light — $9"
  mode: restart
  triggers:
    - trigger: state
      entity_id:
      to: "true"
  conditions:
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ (states('sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype') in ['waiting'] and (as_timestamp(now()) - as_timestamp(states.sensor.dev1_smartdetecttype.last_changed)) >= 300) }}"
    - condition: template
      value_template: "{{ () }}"
  actions:
    - action: light.turn_off
      target:
        entity_id: light.dev0
    - variables:
        Motion_Triggered: "false"
